## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Architecture/Steering Impact

- [ ] I reviewed and updated relevant docs in `docs/steering/` if architecture direction changed
- [ ] I updated `docs/DECISIONS.md` if this PR introduces or changes a major decision
- [ ] I documented migration/fallback behavior when changing transport or boundary paths (for example `http|grpc`)

## Validation

- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] additional manual/integration checks (if applicable)

## Operational Notes

- config flags/env vars added or changed
- compatibility concerns
- rollback path
